beats: Close-up of a vintage tape recorder playing, with a red mug nearby.
The voice of a younger, more fearful Lin Che emanates from the recorder.

dialogue.speaker: Protagonist A (younger, recorded)
dialogue.text: If I forget, start from the red mug.

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: The recorder plays Lin Che's own voice, younger and more afraid.

prompt.positive: Close-up of a vintage tape recorder on a wooden table, red mug beside it, warm dim kitchen lighting, nostalgic atmosphere, shallow depth of field, film grain.
prompt.negative: blurry, overexposed, modern elements, bright colors.
